posts.text: Joe Kent was confirmed by the Senate, appointed by Trump, Green Beret vet with 11 combat deployments, resigned TODAY saying he cannot support the war in Iran. His words: Iran posed no imminent threat to the United States. He says we started this war because of pressure from Israel and its lobby. He called it the same lie used to drag us into Iraq a war that cost thousands of American lives. This isn’t a Democrat saying this. This isn’t a protest. posts.text: The Pentagon confirmed we spent $11.3 billion in the first 6 days of the Iran war.  That same money could have: 1. Funded the VA mental health system for over 5 years 2. Kept the TSA fully funded for more than 6 years, no shutdowns, no agents working for free 3. Fed every food-insecure child in America for a full year 4. Built 113,000 units of affordable housing 5. Covered insulin costs for every diabetic American for nearly 4 years 6 days. $11.3 billion. But sure…there’s no money for any of tha
